title: The Calm of the City
description: This is a piece I recently finished of downtown Kansas City during a recent cool rain storm we had. There is something about the rhythm of a city that captivates me, and how incredibly relaxing rain on a busy street can be. This is acrylic and oil on canvas 24” x 30
alt: Acrylic painting of a rainy blue city street with bright orange umbrellas and yellow taxis
